messages.content:
# Medical Equipment Inspection Checklist

Equipment ID: AMLKZLSG  
Model: Breitenberg Group 8rVc  
Department: Operating Room  
Inspection Date: 2025-02-12  
Inspector: Freda Heathcote  

## Physical Condition

| Checkpoint                  | Pass | Fail | N/A | Notes |
|-----------------------------|------|------|-----|-------|
| Equipment housing intact    | ✓    |      |     |       |
| Display screen clear        |      | ✗    |     |       |
| Control buttons functional  | ✓    |      |     |       |
| Power cord undamaged        | ✓    |      |     |       |
| Mounting brackets secure    | ✓    |      |     |       |
| Wheels/casters condition    | ✓    |      |     |       |
| Labels and markings legible | ✓    |      |     |       |
| Accessories complete        | ✓    |      |     |       |

## Electrical Safety

| Checkpoint               | Pass | Fail | N/A | Notes                     |
|--------------------------|------|------|-----|---------------------------|
| Ground connection        |      | ✗    |     | Housing damage compromises safety |
| Insulation resistance    | ✓    |      |     |                           |
| Leakage current          | ✓    |      |     |                           |
| Power supply stable      | ✓    |      |     |                           |
| Battery backup functional| ✓    |      |     |                           |
| Circuit breaker operation| ✓    |      |     |                           |
| Surge protection         |      |      | -   |                           |
| Cable connections secure | ✓    |      |     |                           |

## Performance Tests

| Checkpoint             | Pass | Fail | N/A | Notes                          |
|------------------------|------|------|-----|--------------------------------|
| Self-test passed       |      |      | -   | Not required for this equipment type |
| Calibration check      | ✓    |      |     |                                |
| Alarm systems          | ✓    |      |     |                                |
| Backup systems         | ✓    |      |     |                                |
| Output accuracy        |      | ✗    |     | Critical error in self-diagnostic |
| Response time          | ✓    |      |     |                                |
| Data storage/retrieval | ✓    |      |     |                                |
| Network connectivity   |      |      | -   | Not required for this equipment type |
| Sensor accuracy        | ✓    |      |     |                                |

## Overall Status

Inspection Result: ✗  
Next Inspection Due: 2025-05-10
